proposal1.heroHeadline: Gmail is losing $500,000 a year on manual proposal processes. Here is how to stop the bleeding.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Manually creating proposals takes hours, while our AI system completes them in just 47 seconds, saving Gmail time and resources.
proposal1.problemsIntro: These are not just inefficiencies, they are measurable losses affecting Gmail's bottom line.

problems.title: Lost Revenue Hours
problems.description: Every hour spent writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals, costing Gmail potential revenue. This inefficiency leads to a loss of approximately $50,000 annually.

problems.title: Excessive Labor Costs
problems.description: Manual proposal creation requires significant staff time, resulting in high labor costs. Gmail could be spending up to $200,000 a year on employee hours that could be automated.

problems.title: Delayed Client Engagement
problems.description: Slow proposal generation delays client engagement, risking client drop-off. This delay may cost Gmail up to 10% of potential new client revenue yearly.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Inconsistent proposal branding leads to a diluted brand image, costing Gmail credibility. This inconsistency could result in a loss of up to 5% in client trust and retention.

problems.title: Higher Error Rates
problems.description: Manual processes increase the risk of errors, potentially costing Gmail $30,000 annually in corrections and lost opportunities.

problems.title: Inefficient Use of Resources
problems.description: Resources spent on manual proposals could be better used elsewhere, costing Gmail in potential innovation and growth. This misallocation could amount to a $20,000 annual loss.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system replaces these costly inefficiencies with rapid, automated proposal generation.

solutions.title: Rapid Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Current process takes hours of manual work. Our system completes it in 47 seconds, freeing up valuable time.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual creation risks inconsistency. Our AI ensures every proposal is branded perfectly every time.

solutions.title: Error Reduction
solutions.description: Human errors are inevitable with manual processes. Our AI minimizes errors, ensuring accuracy and reliability.

solutions.title: Cost Efficiency
solutions.description: High labor costs for manual proposals drain resources. Our system cuts these costs significantly, maximizing resource use.

solutions.title: Enhanced Client Engagement
solutions.description: Delays in proposals can lose clients. With our system, proposals are ready instantly, keeping clients engaged.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Gmail's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Gmail around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Gmail.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Boost Acme Corp's Efficiency with Gmail's Intuitive Email Solutions
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We propose a strategic plan to enhance your communication infrastructure using Gmail's efficient email services, offering 15 GB of storage and mobile access.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is facing significant losses due to inefficient communication systems.

problems.title: Low Email Storage
problems.description: Running out of email storage is causing lost productivity as employees waste time managing old emails. This leads to an estimated 10% reduction in work efficiency.

problems.title: High Spam Volume
problems.description: An overabundance of spam emails is cluttering inboxes, resulting in critical messages being overlooked. This leads to potential revenue losses of up to 15%.

problems.title: Limited Mobile Access
problems.description: Restricted access to emails on mobile devices is causing delays in communication. This results in a 20% reduction in real-time decision-making capabilities.

problems.title: Security Breaches
problems.description: Inadequate security measures are increasing the risk of data breaches. This could result in potential financial losses and reputational damage.

problems.title: Poor Email Organization
problems.description: Disorganized email systems make it difficult to find important information quickly. This reduces employee productivity by approximately 12%.

problems.title: Ineffective Collaboration Tools
problems.description: Lack of integrated collaboration tools hampers team coordination. This results in project delays and an estimated 18% decrease in team efficiency.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Gmail's comprehensive email solutions will address these issues effectively.

solutions.title: 15 GB Storage
solutions.description: Gmail offers 15 GB of storage, ensuring your team never runs out of space. This maximizes productivity by eliminating the need to constantly manage storage.

solutions.title: Spam Protection
solutions.description: Gmail's advanced spam filters keep unwanted emails out of your inbox, ensuring important messages are prioritized. This reduces the risk of missing critical communications.

solutions.title: Mobile Access
solutions.description: With Gmail's mobile access, your team can stay connected anytime, anywhere. This enhances decision-making capabilities by allowing real-time communication.

solutions.title: Security Features
solutions.description: Gmail's robust security measures protect sensitive data from breaches. This mitigates the risk of financial and reputational losses.

metrics.label: Reduction in time spent managing emails.

whyUsCards.title: Scalable Solutions

whyUsCards.title: Comprehensive Support
whyUsCards.description: Our team provides continuous support to ensure seamless email operations.
